feature_summary: Playwright e2e for #728 AC-27 (PaneResizer multi-instance cursor non-residue + cross-worktree split persistence)

criteria.text: tests/e2e/terminal-split-resizer-cursor.spec.ts 新規追加（chromium 限定 self-skip）
criteria.evidence: File created; beforeEach test.skip(testInfo.project.name!=='chromium'). Mobile Safari → skipped.
Uses add-terminal-split, split-resizer-0, terminal-split-pane-*, terminal-split-container, activity-bar-button-files — all verified against source.

criteria.text: history-pane-expand testid を内部 <button> に追加
criteria.evidence: TerminalContainer.tsx button (aria-label='Expand history panel') now has data-testid='history-pane-expand'. Additive; unit suite green.

criteria.text: Scenario 1 手順整合（S3-005: 初期 visible=true なので expand step 不要）
criteria.evidence: Spec does NOT click history-pane-expand; History is visible by default so its PaneResizer already coexists. ensureFilesActivityVisible adds the ActivityPane resizer.

criteria.text: test 隔離（一意 worktreeId + beforeEach クリア）
criteria.evidence: IDs e2e-split-a/b; sessionStorage-guarded addInitScript clears commandmate:terminalSplits:* + layout keys once per test (does not defeat persistence assertions).

criteria.text: AC-27 の2シナリオがいずれも PASS
cursor アサーションは not.toBe('col-resize')
resizer 件数は実構成に合わせる（≥4）
criteria.evidence: Asserts split-resizer count == 2 (3 splits) AND role=separator count >= 4 (ActivityPane+History+2 gaps).

criteria.text: フィクスチャは API ルートモック優先
criteria.evidence: page.route over all /api/ serves deterministic worktree/messages/current-output/tree/slash-commands; no DB/git/session dependency.

criteria.text: chromium 限定は spec self-skip、playwright.config.ts は無変更
criteria.evidence: git diff shows playwright.config.ts unchanged; viewport via spec test.use.

criteria.text: CI 統合の扱いを明確化
criteria.evidence: 方針 B adopted (work-plan §0): CI integration out of scope; .github/workflows unchanged; documented as follow-up.

criteria.text: 実行時間が現実的（localhost 3分以内目安）
criteria.evidence: Both specs ~3-8s total on chromium; well under target.

criteria.text: lint / tsc / test:unit / build 全 PASS
criteria.evidence: tsc exit 0; eslint clean; test:unit 6700 passed/7 skipped; next build compiled.

notes: All 14 acceptance criteria met. AC-27 (the deferred #728 manual-smoke criterion) is now machine-verified.
